list.name_en: 101 reasons to fall in love with Deloitte

elementList.describe_en: Join our team of world-class talent experiences and deliver excellence to our clients to lead change in an ever-evolving world.
elementList.name: 审计及鉴证
elementList.describe: 加入我们的团队，我们为专业人员提供一流的人才体验， 同时为客户提供高质量的审计和鉴证服务，在不断发展的世界中引领变革。

elementList.describe_en: As a top-tier consulting practice, we own the intersection of business and technology and help our clients solve complicated business problems to improve business performance and drive shareholder value.
elementList.name: 管理咨询
elementList.describe: 作为领先的全球管理咨询公司，德勤咨询致力于商业和技术的结合， 帮助客户解决复杂的业务问题，以提高业务绩效并推动股东价值。

elementList.describe_en: Backed by in-depth industry research and insights, we provide quality and tailored solutions in cyber, strategy, regulation and controls to open opportunities for business.
elementList.name: 风险咨询
elementList.describe: 基于我们的行业研究与洞察，德勤风险咨询在网络安全、 战略咨询、监管和控制领域为客户量身定制解决方案，实现更好的发展。

elementList.describe_en: As a leading Tax & Business Advisory team across Greater China Region, we are dedicated to providing clients with a full range of services and lead them through complexity with confidence.
elementList.name: 税务与商务咨询
elementList.describe: 作为大中华区领先的税务与商务咨询服务团队，我们致力于为客户提供全方位的服务，助力客户应对各类税务和商务问题。

elementList.describe_en: Our FA practice is one of the largest and most comprehensive in the Asia Pacific region. We focus on mergers & acquisitions (M&A) and value creation & crisis (VC&C) advisory.
elementList.name: 财务咨询
elementList.describe: 德勤中国财务咨询是亚太地区规模最大、服务最全面的企业财务顾问公司之一，主要提供并购咨询服务和价值创造及危机咨询服务。

elementList.describe_en: Adhering to the strategic arrangement of "one general center, multiple sub-centers", GDC provides internal and external client services to Asia-Pacific member firms for cost reduction, efficiency and agile operation.
elementList.name: 全球交付中心
elementList.describe: 秉承“一个总中心， 多个分中心”的战略布局， 为德勤亚太区提供内外部的专业服务， 成功实现降本增效， 敏捷运营。

contentData.contentTitle_en: 101 Reasons to fall in love with     Deloitte

contentList.content_en: Aligning with Deloitte China's Employee Value Propositions (EVP) "Shaping future talent through impact that matters," we focus on shaping and developing talent and provide personalized and diversified career development paths and world-class learning and development platforms, so that every Deloitter can unleash their potential and make impact.
contentList.content: 我们一如既往践行德勤中国“德育人才，勤创未来“人才价值主张（EVP），高度关注德勤人的塑造与发展，提供个性化、多样的职业发展路径和广阔的学习发展平台 ，赋能德勤人释放潜能、成就不凡。

contentData.contentTitle_en: Enhance talent mobility via Internal Career Marketplace
contentData.contentTitle: 内部职业平台 倡导人才流动

contentList.content_en: Deloitte China is committed to continuously creating opportunities for career success. We offer Smart Talent Experience and encourage you to explore personalized career paths via the well-developed Internal Career Marketplace.
contentList.content: 德勤致力于为员工的职业成功不断创造机会， 通过完善的内部职业平台，为德勤人提供更智捷的职业发展体验，鼓励员工探索个性化的职业发展路径。

contentList.content_en: We proactively explore and are dedicated to cultivating a workplace with love and warmth to let our talent experience happiness and explore all possibilities.
contentList.content: 我们重视德勤人的感受，积极探索，努力营造有爱有温度的职场，让德勤人在德勤，汇聚幸福，绽放精彩。

privacyConfig.regStatement_en:
DELOITTE CHINA TALENT RECRUITMENT PRIVACY NOTICE

 

Last revised: 16 July 2025

 

Regarding how Deloitte China collects and uses your personal information during various stages of the talent recruitment process (including registration, interview and assessment, background check, health check-up and onboarding etc.), please carefully read this article.

 

PRIVACY NOTICE

 

Introduction

Thank you for your interest in exploring career opportunities with Deloitte China. Before continuing, please take a few minutes to read and understand our Privacy Notice. This Privacy Notice explains what personal information we may gather about you as part of our recruitment activities and how this information may be used and shared. This Privacy Notice also sets out your rights in relation to your personal information and who you can contact for additional questions or queries.

 

In this Privacy Notice, we will refer to your information as “personal information”.   Please note that we may sometimes collectively refer to collecting, handling, storing and protecting your personal information as “processing” such information.

 

Who does this Privacy Notice apply to and what does it cover?

This Privacy Notice applies to the Deloitte entity that has posted the position you are applying for. Unless otherwise stated at the time of collection, your personal information will be processed in accordance with this Privacy Notice and with the laws of the country where that Deloitte entity is located (these Deloitte entities are referred to as “we”, “us”, and “our” in this document).

 

This Privacy Notice also contains information about when we may share your personal information with other members of the Deloitte Network and other third parties (for example, our service providers). As used in this Privacy Notice, “Deloitte Network” refers to Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, a UK private company limited by guarantee (“DTTL”), its network of member firms and their related entities.

 

What information do we collect?

The personal information that we may collect or obtain includes your name, contact information (for example, your home address, phone number and email address), and employment and education history (for example, information about your current and former employer(s), the school(s) you have attended and the degree(s) you have attained), certificate and/or license information, geolocation, internet protocol address, your household information, as well as information about your physical and/ or mental health (if applicable), involvement in investigations/ penalties/criminal activities (if applicable), and medical examination results (only during the pre-onboarding medical examination phase).

 

We may collect or obtain such information because you give it to us in connection with your application for a position, or the information may be submitted on your behalf in support of a Deloitte position you have applied for or expressed interest in. For instance, to the extent appropriate and in accordance with applicable law, the Deloitte entity seeking to fill the position may seek additional data and/or verify your personal information by contacting your references, referrer, and other third parties.

 

If you are providing personal information about an individual other than yourself (such as a referred candidate), you must obtain the consent of the individual before submitting any of their personal information.

 

After your submission of the application for a position, we may connect with you through outbound calling bot to communicate with you about potential career opportunities in Deloitte, and the conversation will be recorded after obtaining your consent.

 

After your application for a position enters to recruitment process, we may call you through outbound calling bot to remind you to submit recruitment related materials for kicking off related process, and the conversation will be recorded after obtaining your consent.

 

As part of our recruitment process or recruitment related activities, we might gather sensitive information about you because you voluntarily provide the information to us or we are required to collect the information as a result of legal requirements imposed on us. If we do receive any sensitive information about you, we will, where necessary, obtain your explicit consent to collect and use such information in accordance with applicable laws. To better understand your needs and provide necessary support and assistance after you join Deloitte, you may voluntarily share whether you are a person with a disability or part of the neurodiverse community. This information will only be used to assess and adjust physical facilities and provide mental health care, ensuring all employees can enjoy a work environment on an equal basis. We will strictly comply with relevant laws and regulations to ensure the secure storage and use of such sensitive information, and to ensure that it will not affect the recruitment decision or your personal rights. You have the right to choose not to provide this information, and this decision will not impact your application process in any way.

 

To assess your suitability for the position you are applying for, we will collect information about your previous work experience and whether you may be involved in any investigations, penalties, or criminal activities related to relevant institutions. If you choose not to confirm these details at this time, the recruitment specialist may seek further clarification with you during subsequent interview stages. If the necessary confirmation cannot be obtained, which is required to meet the specific needs of the position, your application process may be terminated.

 

In addition, after you accept the notification of medical examination from Deloitte China's mainland office, you are required to go to the designated medical examination center for the new employee onboarding health check-up, and the results must meet the standards.  When making an appointment for the health check-up or when arriving at the medical examination center, you must provide your name and identity number and show a valid identification document to the medical examination center for registration and verification of personal information.  Regarding the specific arrangement details, Human Resources Department will contact you at the appropriate time; your medical examination result may be sent back to us by medical examination center to assess whether the results meet the standards; if you decline to undergo the health check-up, it will be considered as a refusal of Deloitte China's employment offer. 

 

This Recruitment System is mainly used for managing recruitment activities and job applications.  You are strictly prohibited from uploading content to the Recruitment System that is unlawful or that is considered regulated data (including, without limitation, data covered by the laws, statutes, and regulations specified above) that would require additional specific security measures to be implemented.

 

Social Media Tools

Our application process allows you to pull relevant information from social media tools (such as LinkedIn, Indeed, Dropbox or Google Drive) into your online application form. To the extent you choose to feed any personal or other information from such social media tools, this information will be used in accordance with applicable law and this Privacy Notice.

 

Log information, cookies and web beacons

Our Website may collect standard internet log information, including your IP address, browser type and language, access times and referring website addresses.  Additionally, to improve your experience when you use our Website and ensure that it is functioning effectively, we (or our service providers) may use cookies (small text files stored in a user’s browser) and web beacons (electronic images that allow our Website to count visitors who have accessed a particular page and to access certain cookies), which may collect personal information. Additional information on how we use cookies and other tracking technologies and how you can control these can be found in our cookie notice https://www2.deloitte.com/global/en/footerlinks1/cookies.html.

 

Children

We understand the importance of protecting children’s privacy, especially in the interactive online world. Our recruitment activities are not designed for or intentionally targeted at children at 14 years of age or younger. It is not our policy to intentionally collect or store information about anyone under the age of 14.

 

How do we use information about you?

 

Use of personal information for the recruitment process and recruitment related activities

 

We will use the personal information that we collect or obtain about you in order to:

 

•           manage your application for employment

•           contact you during your candidacy, send you announcements, or request additional information as required

•           assess your suitability for other current and future roles at Deloitte

•           build a relationship with you and learn more about your career interests

•           create a candidate profile for you in our Recruitment System

•           call you for career opportunities communication or reminder

 

To the extent permitted by applicable local data protection and privacy laws and subject to strict application of this Privacy Notice, we may also use your personal information for career-related marketing purposes or to send you promotional materials or communications regarding events and career opportunities within the Deloitte Network that we feel may be of interest to you. We may also contact you to seek feedback on recruitment services provided by entities within the Deloitte Network.

 

Use of personal information upon hiring

 

Should you be hired by a Deloitte Entity, your personal information may be used in connection with the employer-employee relationship as permitted by applicable laws.

 

Use of personal information for Website Administration and Improvement

 

In order to make sure our Website operates efficiently and as intended, we may also use your personal information collected via our Website to:

 

•           manage and improve our Website

•           tailor the content on our Website to provide you with a more personalized experience and draw your attention to information that may be of interest to you

•           perform general statistical research, analysis and reporting activities, including visitor activity and demographic reports

•           manage and respond to any request that you submit through our Website

 

Use of personal information for other activities that form part of the operation of our business

 

We may also use your personal information for the purposes of or in connection with:

•         applicable legal or regulatory requirements

•         requests and communications from competent authorities

•         protecting our rights and/or property

 

On what basis do we collect and process information about you?

We may use your personal information for the purposes outlined above because: (1) we have a legitimate interest in evaluating your application for employment and managing our relationship with you; (2) the information is required in order to provide you with the information that you have indicated you are interested in receiving; or (3) we are subject to legal or regulatory obligations, such as providing information to a public body or law enforcement agency.

 

To the extent that we process any sensitive personal information relating to you for any of the purposes outlined above, we will do so because either: (1) you have given us your explicit consent to process the information; (2) the processing is necessary to carry out our obligations under the employment, social security or other applicable law; or (3) the processing is necessary for the establishment, exercise or defense of legal claims.

 

Who will we disclose your information to?

In connection with one or more of the purposes outlined in the “How do we use information about you?” section above, we may disclose details about you to:

•           other members of the Deloitte Network

•           third parties that provide services to us and/or the Deloitte Network, such as website and system hosting, online assessment services, employment verification services, medical examination scheduling and check-ups and vendors providing outbound calling bot services (whether located within or outside our jurisdiction)

•           competent authorities, including courts and authorities regulating us or another member of the Deloitte Network, in each case to comply with legal or regulatory obligations or requests

•           as part of a corporate transaction, such as a sale, divestiture, reorganization, merger or acquisition.

 

Please note that our recruitment system is hosted in the People's Republic of China, and that some of the recipients of your personal information referenced above may be based in countries or regions without data protection rules similar to those in effect in your area of residence. In such cases, we will ensure that there are adequate safeguards in place to protect your personal information.

 

How do we keep your information secure?

We have in place reasonable commercial standards of technology and operational security to protect all personal information provided by individuals from loss, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. Only authorized personnel, who have been made appropriately aware of our privacy obligations, are provided access to personal information.

 

Although we will take appropriate security measures once we receive your personal information, transmitting information over the internet (including email) has never been completely secure.  In case of any information security incident, usually defined as the situation which as reasonably suspected may lead to unauthorized or improper collection, use, access, disclosure, modification and/or exposure of personal information, including but not limited to malicious attack, accidental data leakage, password theft, etc.. You can contact us through https://www2.deloitte.com/cn/en/footerlinks/contact-us.html or CNPrivacy@deloitte.com.hk.  When we know that there is an information security incident at the platform, we will promptly publicize it on the website or inform you separately according to the law, and take a series of necessary control measures to reduce or prevent the loss of personal information and reduce the impact of information security incident.

 

How long will we keep your information?

We retain personal information as long as is necessary for the fulfillment of the purposes identified above in the “How do we use information about you?” section or as otherwise necessary to comply with applicable laws. Where personal information is no longer necessary or relevant for our identified purposes or where you have indicated that you no longer are interested in staying in contact with us, we will securely dispose of your personal information.

 

How may you access, review or request removal of your information?

You can access your profile on the Recruitment System at any time to review or update any personal information submitted.

 

Where required by applicable law, you may also contact us with various requests in relation to your personal information. In particular, you may:

•           obtain confirmation that your personal information is being processed and request a copy of the personal information held about you; and

•           ask that the personal information held about you be corrected or supplemented if such information is inaccurate or incomplete; ask that the personal information held about you be deleted, or restrict the way in which such information is used; and

•           object to the processing of your personal information.

 

If you are located in the European Economic Area and are dissatisfied with the way in which your personal information has been processed or the manner in which a privacy query or request that you have raised has been handled, you may have a right to complain to the relevant Data Protection Authority (“DPA”).

 

 

Contact us

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Notice or your personal information, please direct them to Deloitte China Recruitment Shared Services Centre at hrrcservice@deloittecn.com.cn.

 

 

Copyright and Trademark Notices

Unless otherwise indicated, the content in the Recruitment System is provided by the Deloitte Entity that has posted the position or another entity within the Deloitte Network.

 

“Deloitte”, “Touche”, “Tohmatsu”, “Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu”, “Deloitte & Touche”, the Deloitte logo, and local language variants of the foregoing trademarks, and certain product names that appear on the Recruitment System, are trademarks or registered trademarks of entities within the Deloitte Network. You shall not use the name “Deloitte”, “Touche”, “Tohmatsu”, “Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu”, “Deloitte & Touche”, the Deloitte logo, or local language variants of the foregoing trademarks either alone or in combination with other words or design elements. You may not use any of the foregoing names, marks or logos in any press release, advertisement, or other promotional or marketing material or media, whether in written, oral, electronic, visual or any other form.

 

References to other parties’ trademarks on the Recruitment System are for identification purposes only and do not indicate that such parties have approved the Recruitment System or any of its contents. This document does not grant you any right to use the trademarks of other parties.

 

 

ABOUT DELOITTE

 

Deloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited (“DTTL"), its global network of member firms, and their related entities (collectively, the “Deloitte organization"). DTTL (also referred to as “Deloitte Global") and each of its member firms and related entities are legally separate and independent entities, which cannot obligate or bind each other in respect of third parties. DTTL and each DTTL member firm and related entity is liable only for its own acts and omissions, and not those of each other. DTTL does not provide services to clients. Please see www.deloitte.com/about to learn more.

 

REVISIONS

 

We may modify or amend this privacy notice from time to time (i.e., the webpage that you are currently viewing).  To let you know when we make changes to this privacy notice, we will amend the revision date at the top of this page.  We encourage you to periodically review this statement to be informed about how we are protecting your information. Your continued use of the Recruitment System following changes to this document constitutes your agreement to the revised document.
privacyConfig.regStatement:
德勤中国人才招聘隐私声明

最新修订时间：2025年07月16日

 

有关德勤中国在人才招聘活动中各个阶段（包括注册、面试与考核、背景调查、体检、入职等）如何收集和使用您提交的个人信息, 请仔细阅读本文。

 

 

隐私声明

简介

感谢您对德勤中国工作机会的关注。在开始之前，请您用几分钟时间阅读并理解我们的隐私声明。本隐私声明详细解释了在招聘环节中我们可能会向您收集的一些个人信息以及这些信息将如何被使用和共享。本隐私声明还列出了关于您的个人信息所拥有的权利以及在遇到问题时的相关联系人。

 

在本隐私声明中，您的信息将被称为“个人信息”。请注意，有时我们可能会将搜集、处理、储存及保护您的个人信息这些词汇统称为“处理”此类信息。

 

本隐私声明的适用人群及涵盖内容

本隐私声明适用于您正在申请的由德勤实体发布的职位。除非在收集信息之前有其他声明，否则您的个人信息将依照本隐私声明及该德勤实体所处国家的法律进行处理（在本文件当中，这些德勤实体被称为“我们”和“我们的”）。

 

本隐私声明还包含了我们可能会向德勤网络的其他成员所和第三方共享您的个人信息（如，我们的服务供应商）。在本隐私声明中所用到的“德勤网络”特指德勤有限公司 (一家根据英国法律组成的私人的担保有限公司)，以及其全球成员所网络和它们的关联机构。

 

我们收集哪些信息？

我们可能会收集或获取的个人信息包括您的姓名、联系方式（如，您的家庭住址、电话号码和电子邮箱地址）、工作和教育经历（如，您目前和过往的雇主、您就读过的学校和获得过的学位）、证书和/或执照、地理位置、IP地址和您的家庭信息、对自身身体和/或心理健康的认知信息（如适用）、牵涉调查/处罚/违法犯罪等情况（如适用）、体检符合情况（仅在入职前体检阶段）。

 

我们可能会收集或获得此类信息是因为您在申请某职位时将其提交给我们，也可能是您申请的或您表达过感兴趣的某个德勤职位需要此类信息的支持，由他人代您提交了这些信息。例如，在合理合法的情况下，有招聘需求的德勤实体可能会收集关于您的额外信息和/或联系您的证明人、推荐人以及其他第三方人员以确认您的个人信息。

 

如果您提供的个人信息是属于您之外其他人的（如被推荐的候选人），在提交任何其个人信息之前，您必须获得该个人的同意。

 

在您向我们投递简历后，我们可能会通过外呼小助理向您拨打职业机会沟通电话，用于与您沟通德勤可能的工作机会，届时将在获得您的同意后对通话内容进行录音。

 

在您进入招聘流程后，我们可能会通过外呼小助理向您拨打提醒电话，用于提醒您递交招聘相关资料开启入职相关流程，届时将在获得您的同意后对通话内容进行录音。

 

在我们的招聘过程或招聘相关活动当中，我们有可能会收集到有关您的敏感信息，或是因为您自愿将此类信息提供给我们，或是我们所需要承担的法律义务要求我们收集此类信息。如果我们收到了有关您的任何敏感信息，我们将在必要时会依据相关法律在收集和使用此类信息之前征得您明确的同意。为了更好地了解您的需求，并在您加入德勤后提供必要的支持与帮助，您可以自愿分享是否属于残疾人士或神经多样性群体的相关信息。此信息将仅用于评估和调整合理的物理环境设施和心理状态关怀，确保所有员工均能在平等的基础上享受工作环境。我们将严格遵守相关法律法规，确保此类敏感信息的安全存储与使用，不会影响招聘决策或个人权益。您有权选择不提供这些信息，且这一决定不会对您的应聘过程产生任何影响。

 

为了评估您与所申请职位的适配性情况，我们会向您收集上一段工作经历情况及您是否可能涉及相关机构的调查、处罚或曾有违法犯罪情况。如您选择暂不确认相关情况，招聘专员可能会在后续面试流程中向您进一步确认具体情况。如无法获得相关确认，以致无法满足特定职位需求，您的应聘流程可能因此终止。

 

另外，在您接受德勤中国大陆分所的体检通知之后，您需要前往指定的体检中心进行新员工入职体检，体检结果需要符合录用标准; 在预约体检或到达体检中心时，您需向体检中心提供你的姓名和身份证号码并出示有效证件以供登记和核实个人资料，有关具体的安排细节，人力资源部将会在合适的时候与您联系，体检中心可能会将您的体检符合情况反馈给我们，用于我们评估体检结果是否符合录用标准; 如果您拒绝接受体检, 将被视为拒绝德勤中国的聘用邀请。

 

本招聘系统主要用于管理招聘活动和就业申请。我們严禁您将非法内容或被视为受监管数据的内容（包括但不限于上述法律法规上所包含的信息）上传至招聘系统。

 

社交媒体工具

我们的招聘流程允许您从社交媒体工具（如领英、Indeed、Dropbox或谷歌网盘）中提取相关信息至您的网上申请表格。如果您选择从这些社交媒体工具上获取个人或其他信息，获取的信息将依照相关法律和本隐私声明进行使用。

 

日志信息、cookie和网络信标

我们的网站可能会收集标准网络日志信息，包括您的IP地址、浏览器类型和语言、访问次数和访问者来自的网址。另外，为了改进您在使用我们网站时的体验以及确保网站运行顺畅，我们（或我们的服务供应商）可能会使用cookie（储存在用户浏览器里的小段文本文件）和网络信标（一种电子图像，让我们的网址可以利用其来计算某个页面的访问量以及访问某些cookie），这可能会涉及到收集个人信息。关于我们如何使用cookie和其他追踪技术以及您可以如何来对这些手段进行控制，您可以在我们的cookie声明中找到更多的信息 (网址: https://www2.deloitte.com/global/en/footerlinks1/cookies.html) 。

 

儿童

我们知道保护儿童隐私的重要性，尤其是在当今这个互动的网络世界中。我们的招聘活动不专门针对14岁或以下的儿童。我们不会主动收集或储存任何14岁以下儿童的相关信息。

 

 

我们如何使用您的信息？

 

招聘环节及招聘相关活动对个人信息的使用

 

我们会将我们收集或获得关于您的个人信息, 用作以下用途：

•           管理您的工作申请

•           在您作为候选人期间联系您、给您发送通知或在有需要时向您索取额外信息

•           评估您是否适合德勤当前或以后的其他职位

•           与您建立关系，了解您的职业兴趣

•           为您在我们的招聘系统里面建立应聘人档案

•           向您拨打职业机会沟通电话或提醒电话

 

在当地相关保障个人资料和隐私法允许的范围内，并在严格遵照本隐私声明的前提下，我们还可能会将您的个人信息用于职业推广，或向您推送我们觉得您会感兴趣的与德勤网络内的活动或工作机会相关的宣传材料或信息。我们可能还会联系您，向您获取对德勤网络内实体提供的招聘服务的反馈意见。

 

聘用后对个人信息的使用

 

如果您被某德勤实体聘用，在相关法律允许的情况下，您的个人信息可能会因为存在雇主和雇员的关系而被使用。

 

因网站管理和改进对个人信息的使用

 

为了确保我们的网站运行顺畅，功能正常，我们可能会使用通过我们的网站所收集到您的个人信息，目的如下：

•           管理和改进我们的网站

•           调整我们网站上的内容以便为您提供更加个性化的体验以及让您关注到您可能会感兴趣的信息

•           进行常规的统计研究、分析和报表操作，包括用户活动和用户统计数据报表

•           管理及回应您在我们网站上提交的任何要求

 

我们的业务运作中的其他活动对个人信息的使用

 

我们还可能会因为以下目的或与以下情况相关时使用您的个人信息：

•           相关法律或监管规定

•           主管当局的要求和授意

•           保护我们的权利和/或资产

 

我们收集和处理有关您的信息的原因

我们可能会将您的个人信息用于以上所述目的的原因如下：（1）我们有评估您的工作申请以及管理我们与您的关系的合理需求；（2）需要您的个人信息以便向您提供您表示有兴趣接收的信息； 或者（3）我们受法律或监管义务的约束，例如需要提供信息给公共机构或执法机关。

 

如果我们出于上述任何目的处理与您相关的任何敏感个人信息，我们这样做的原因如下：（1）您已明确同意我们处理该信息；（2）处理该信息是履行我们根据就业、社会保障或其他适用法律承担的义务所必需的；或（3）处理该信息对于法律索赔的确立、行使或辩护是必要的。

 

我们将向谁披露您的信息？

对于上述“我们如何使用您的信息？”一节中所述的一个或多个目的，我们可能会向以下人员披露有关您的细节信息：

 

•           德勤网络中的其他成员所

•           向我们和/或德勤网络提供服务的第三方，如网站和系统托管、提供在线答题测评服务、提供就业验证服务、提供体检预约安排及检查、支持外呼服务的公司等（无论其位于我们的司法管辖区内或外）

•           主管当局，包括法庭和监管我们或其他德勤网络成员所的官方机构，为了在各种情形下遵守法律、监管义务或要求

•           作为公司交易的一部分，如业务出售、分拆、重组、合并或收购。

 

请注意，我们的招聘系统服务器设置在中国大陆。上述个人信息的某些接收者所在的国家或地区可能没有实施数据保护条例或相关的法律条款。在这种情况下，我们将确保有足够的保护措施来保护您的个人信息。

 

我们如何保证您的信息安全？

我们制定了合理的技术和运营安全商业标准，以保护个人提供的所有个人信息免遭丢失、误用和未经授权的访问、披露、更改或破坏。只有经过适当了解我们隐私义务的授权人员才能访问个人信息。

 

尽管我们一旦收到您的个人资料便采取适当的安全措施，然而通过互联网（包括电子邮件）传输资料向来无法做到彻底安全。我们将尽力保护个人资料，但我们无法保证向我们传输或由我们传输的资料的安全性。如发生任何信息安全事件，通常定义为合理预期可导致未经授权或不当地搜集、使用、访问、披露、修改和/或暴露个人信息的情况，包括但不限于遭受恶意攻击、意外的数据泄露、密码被盗用等，您可以通过https://www2.deloitte.com/cn/zh/footerlinks/contact-us.html  或  CNPrivacy@deloitte.com.hk联系我们。当我们知晓发生信息安全事件时，我们将及时在网站中依法予以公示说明或另行通知您，同时采取一系列必要的控制措施来减少或阻止个人信息的丢失、降低信息安全事件的影响。

 

我们将保留您的信息多长时间？

我们将保留个人信息至达成 "我们如何使用您的信息？" 部分中所述的目的所需要的时间，或者适用法律所规定的时间。如果个人信息不再必要或与我们确定的目的相关，或者您已表示您不再有兴趣与我们保持联系，我们将安全地销毁您的个人信息。

 

您可如何访问、查看或要求删除您的信息？

您可以随时访问招聘系统上的个人资料，以查看或更新提交任何个人信息。

 

在适用法律要求的情况下，您也可以联系我们就您的个人信息提出各种要求。特别是，您可以：

•           获得您的个人信息正在被处理的确认，并要求取得我们持有的有关您的个人信息的副本；以及

•           如果此类信息不准确或不完整，要求更正或补充我们持有的有关您的个人信息; 要求删除我们持有的有关您的个人信息，或限制此类信息的使用方式；以及

•           反对处理您的个人信息

 

如果您位于欧洲经济区，并且对您的个人信息的处理方式或您提出的隐私查询或请求的处理方式不满意，您有权向相关数据保护机构进行投诉（"DPA"）。

 

 

联系我们

如果您对本隐私声明或您的个人信息有任何疑问或疑虑，请以电邮将其发送至 hrrcservice@deloittecn.com.cn, 与德勤中国招聘共享服务中心联系。

 

 

版权和商标声明

除非另有说明，本招聘系统中的内容由发布该职位的德勤实体或德勤网络中的其他实体提供。

 

"Deloitte”、“Touche”、“Tohmatsu”、“Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu”、“Deloitte & Touche”、Deloitte徽标、上述商标的本地语言变体以及招聘系统中出现的某些产品名称是德勤网络内实体的商标或注册商标。 您不得单独或与其他文字或设计元素结合使用“Deloitte”、“Touche”、“Tohmatsu”、“Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu”、“Deloitte & Touche”、Deloitte徽标或上述商标的本地语言变体。 您不得在任何新闻稿、广告或其他宣传或营销材料或媒体中使用上述任何名称、标记或徽标，无论是书面、口头、电子、视觉或任何其他形式。

 

在招聘系统中提及他方的商标仅用于识别目的，并不表示他们已批准本招聘系统或其任何内容。 本文件不授予您使用他方商标的任何权利。

 

 

关于德勤

 

Deloitte（“德勤"）泛指一家或多家德勤有限公司，以及其全球成员所网络和它们的关联机构（统称为“德勤组织"）。德勤有限公司（又称“德勤全球"）及其每一家成员所和它们的关联机构均为具有独立法律地位的法律实体，相互之间不因第三方而承担任何责任或约束对方。德勤有限公司及其每一家成员所和它们的关联机构仅对自身行为承担责任，而对相互的行为不承担任何法律责任。德勤有限公司并不向客户提供服务。请参阅 www.deloitte.com/cn/about了解更多信息。

 

 

修订

 

我们可能会不时修改或修订本隐私声明（即您当前查看的本网页）。为了让您了解我们何时修订本隐私声明，我们将更新本页顶部的修订日期。因此，我们鼓励您定期查阅本声明，以了解我们如何保护您的信息。

Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private Privacy Policy
 
Last updated: August 5,2025
Effective date: August 5,2025
 
Welcome to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private products and services!
 
In order to protect user information, Shanghai Dayee Cloud Computing Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private" or "we") and its affiliates will take the corresponding safety precautions in accordance with applicable laws and regulations. For this purpose, Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private has developed this Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private Privacy Policy (hereinafter referred to as the "privacy policy") and reminds you that: you must carefully read and thoroughly understand this privacy policy before using Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services, and confirm that you fully understand and agree to the terms before using the related products and services. By using the services provided by Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private, you accept and agree to this privacy policy.
 
Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private (hereinafter referred to as "we") respects and protects user information and will treat the information with high degree of diligence and prudence. When you use Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services, we will collect, process and disclose your information in accordance with this privacy policy. We hope that this privacy policy can give you a clear picture of how we treat your information, so we encourage you to read this privacy policy in its entirety to help you understand how to protect your privacy.
 
[Hint]
It is recommended that you carefully read the Privacy Policy (especially the contents in bold) and become familiar with our rules for the processing of your personal information. If you have any questions about the content of this document, you may consult us via the contact details listed in the Privacy Policy ("This Privacy Policy").
 
If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this privacy policy, you may contact us at: Email: service@dayee.com Address:Building 4, No. 1588 Xinyang Highway, Lingang New Area, China (Shanghai) Pilot Free Trade Zone
 
This privacy policy mainly includes the following contents:
1. Definitions
2. Applicable Scope
3. Collection and Use of User Personal Information
4. Means of Sharing, Transferring and Publicly Disclosing User Personal Information
5. User Business Data and Public Information
6. User Rights Terms
7. Use of Cookies and Similar Technologies
8. User Personal Information Security Protection Measures
9. How We Store User Personal Information
10. Special Terms for User Personal Information of Minors
11. Update of Privacy Policy
12. Complaints and Reporting
13. Our Contact Information

 

1. Definitions

1.1. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private website: refers to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private official website (https://en.dayee.com/) and its clients .
1.2. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private: unless otherwise stipulated, it refers to Shanghai Dayee Cloud Computing Co., Ltd., the operator of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private website.
1.3. Users: refer to individuals, enterprises, companies, institutions, and other organizations that have received or purchased Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services and products and received relevant al and network support services. Users have civil rights and must be able to independently assume civil obligations under the laws of the People's Republic of China.
1.4. User Personal Information: refers to user information submitted by users to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private or collected by Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private. The above information may be recorded electronically or by other means, and may be used alone or in combination with other information to identify a specific natural person or reflect the activities of a specific natural person.In this Privacy Policy, personal information includes: your personal information related to your potential job application and employment with the Company. In particular, we will process some, certain or all of the following categories of your personal information:
(1) Master data: including but not limited to name, age, gender, date of birth, citizen identity, marital status, nationality, race, ethnicity, qualifications, income, hobbies, photos or other images (including closed-circuit television images), biometric data, and audio/video materials, etc.;
(2) Contact information: including but not limited to home address, telephone number, email address, work address, work telephone number, etc.;
(3) Recruitment data: including but not limited to work experience, recommendations, certificates of good conduct, background checks, academic credentials, professional experience, affiliations, memberships, professional skills, career aspirations, job application status, training experiences, project experiences, language proficiency, obtained certificates, self-evaluations, etc.
(4) Depending on the nature of the enterprise, it may also involve the collection of other information necessary or appropriate for your employment in the enterprise.
1.5. Personal sensitive information: refers to personal information that, once leaked, illegally provided or abused, may endanger personal and property safety, and easily lead to damage or discriminatory treatment of personal reputation, physical and mental health, etc. The sensitive personal information of Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services includes some or all of the following personal sensitive information related to your potential job application and employment with the Company: mobile phone number, bank account, user password, ID card or other identification documents, marital status, property information, religious or similar beliefs, biometric data, health status, offense/criminal records, offense/criminal charges, judgments, personal information of children under the age of 16 (inclusive), etc. This does not include information that can be obtained through public channels..
1.6. Business Data: different from user information, it refers to the data processed by Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private users through Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private's technical services, such as uploading, downloading, and distributing services.
1.7. Collection: refers to Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private’s behavior of obtaining control over user personal information, including automatic collection through being actively provided by the user, interaction with the user or recording of user behavior, and indirect acquisition through sharing, transferring, and collection of public information.
1.8. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization user: the term refers to an enterprise or other organization that designates an authorized administrator to register as a user of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System, create its corporate work platform in the capacity of an administrator, and use the products or services of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System. Such enterprise may be your current employer or an employer with which you intend to establish an employment relationship through recruitment or other means, and is hereinafter referred to as the "Enterprise User" or "your Employer".
1.9. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization administrator: refers to an individual user of Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private who has the operating permissions of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization user management platform system, and has been authorized or specified by the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization to enable/manage/use Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services on behalf of the enterprise/organization.
1.10. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private individual user: Refers to an individual user who is invited by an enterprise User (i.e., your Employer) to join and use the corporate work platform for completing the Enterprise User's Intelligent Recruitment Management System business, or an individual user who registers on the corporate work platform and submits a resume for the purpose of joining the enterprise, as well as an individual user who registers and uses Intelligent Recruitment Management System's products or services for other needs, hereinafter referred to as "You" or "End User".
1.11. Personal information controller: refers to the organization or individual that has the right to determine the purposes and methods of personal information processing. Some of the personal information controllers of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services in this privacy policy are Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization users.

 

2. Applicable Scope

2.1. This privacy policy applies to all Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services provided by us, including Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private's public cloud system service platform built based on Internet technologies and various enterprise Internet application services based on the cloud platform, as well as the mobile apps (APPs such as Intelligent Recruitment Management System) involved in the above services.
2.2. Except as otherwise provided in other clauses of this Policy, this privacy policy does not apply to the services provided to you by other third parties.

 

3. Collection and Use of User Personal Information

When you use our products and/or services, we need/may need to collect and use the following two types of your personal information:
(1) The necessary information that you must authorize us to collect and use in order to provide you with the basic functionalities of our products and/or services. If you refuse to provide the corresponding information, you will not be able to use our products and/or services properly;
(2) The optional information you can authorize us to collect and use in order to provide you with additional functionalities of our products and/or services. If you refuse to provide the corresponding information, you will not be able to use the relevant additional functionalities or achieve the intended functional effects, but this will not affect your normal use of the basic functionalities of our products and/or services.
 
3.1. Our purposes of using user personal information
3.1.1. In order to provide services to you, we will send you messages, notices or communicate with you by means of written, telephone, online or other methods, including but not limited to the verification codes necessary to ensure completion of the services, and pushed notifications necessary to use the services;
3.1.2. To improve the security of services provided by us and our affiliates and partners, ensure the safety of the operating environment and identify the abnormal status of account, protect the personal and property safety of you, other users or the public from being infringed, better prevent phishing websites, fraud, network vulnerabilities, computer viruses, cyber-attacks, network intrusions and other security risks, and more accurately identify violations of laws and regulations or Intelligent Recruitment Management SystemIntelligent Recruitment Management System-related agreements and rules, we may use your personal information to integrate device information, relevant network logs and information legally shared by our affiliates and partners to determine your account and transaction risks, conduct identity verification, security incident detection and prevention. We will also take necessary recording, auditing, analysis and disposal measures according to laws;
3.1.3. 3.2. Scope of user personal information we collect
Your personal information refers to the information that can determine your personal identity when used alone or in combination with other information. When you or your enterprise organization users register and use our websites, products or services, we will collect the necessary personal information. The personal information required for collecting and using basic functions mainly refers to the relevant information needed when applying for a job or using Intelligent Recruitment Management System. You must provide such information for us to enable the above-mentioned basic functions. If you do not provide the relevant information, you may not be able to use the corresponding functions on Intelligent Recruitment Management System.as follows:
3.2.1 Registering an Account
You may register a personal account through the Recruitment Platform to submit resumes, apply for jobs, or use our services. When registering, we need to collect your mobile phone number or personal email address, and we will verify your identity by sending an SMS verification code or email. You may also log in by linking your WeChat account. To save login information and sync data across devices, we will need your permission to obtain certain information from the third-party account, such as the unique identifier, avatar, and nickname for third-party linked login. For privacy controls, options, and specific privacy policies related to your third-party accounts, please refer to the privacy policies of the third-party platforms.
3.2.2 Creating a Resume
You may register an account and create your resume on the Recruitment Platform or WeChat official account. When filling out your resume, we need to collect all or part of the data included in items 1.6 and 1.7.
3.2.3 Uploading a Resume
You may also log in to the Recruitment Platform with your personal registered account and upload your resume. We will parse the uploaded resume to complete your personal information. Please ensure the accuracy of the information in the resume you upload.
3.2.4 During the Application Process
After submitting your resume on the Recruitment Platform or WeChat official account, we may request you to supplement some information included in items 1.6 and 1.7.
3.2.5 Talent Pool Updates
If your resume is recommended by others or relevant institutions and enters our talent pool, we may need you to supplement or update some information included in item 1.6.
3.2.6 Information Obtained from Other Sources
We may obtain your personal information and other information from other legitimate sources, such as public databases, social media, third-party service providers, and other partners (e.g., third-party assessment providers, background check agencies, headhunters, recommenders, etc.), as well as any other written or verbal communications, video materials, etc., received during or before the recruitment process. We will strive to verify the legitimacy of the information sources and protect your personal information. We will not collect your personal information solely for the purpose of improving service quality or enhancing user experience.
3.3. How we collect user personal information
3.3.1. We will collect and store the personal information provided by you when you sign up, log in, browse, and/or use the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private products and services.
3.3.2. We will collect and store the personal information about you recorded by Intelligent Recruitment Management System during providing you with the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services;

6. User Rights Terms

6.1. Query, correction and deletion of users' personal information
6.1.1. You may access and copy your personal profile information, application records, subscription information, etc., by logging in to the Recruitment Platform or WeChat official account;
6.1.2 You may modify your existing personal information in your account, including but not limited to your resume, subscription information, favorited positions, etc. When you find that the personal information about you on the Platform is incorrect and you cannot modify it by yourself in the account, you may "contact us" and we will correct or update the incorrect or incomplete information;
6.1.3 When you no longer use our products or services and request to delete your personal information, you have the right to request the deletion of personal information on the Platform. You may independently modify or delete your personal information in the resume settings, and you need to contact customer service to delete the corresponding information from the backup systems. However, in accordance with the requirements of regulatory authorities to combat crimes and maintain national security, we may record and retain your communication information.
6.1.4. After you consent to our processing of your personal information, you may withdraw your consent through the contact information published in this Privacy Policy. However, your withdrawal of consent shall not affect the validity of the personal information processing activities we have carried out based on your consent before the withdrawal.
6.1.5. When you leave your enterprise, your data will be deleted by your enterprise administrator. You may contact us at service@dayee.com, and we will respond to and complete your request within 15 business days.
 
6.2. Processing of personal information for storage purposes only
You have the right to stop the processing of your personal information collected by us for purposes other than storage if:
6.2.1. You believe such personal information is incorrect (limited to the period during which we verify if it is correct);
6.2.2. It is illegal to process such personal information, so the information are to be removed. However, you wish to keep it for storage purposes only;
6.2.3. It is no longer necessary to process such personal information, so the information are to be removed. However, you wish to keep it for storage in order to initiate, claim or contend with legal remedies.
You may contact us at service@dayee.com and we will respond to and complete your request within 15 business days.
 
6.3 Portability of personal information
You have the right to obtain a copy of your personal information that have been collected. You have the right to obtain this information in a structured, generic, machine-readable format. You may obtain a copy of your personal information through your enterprise administrator or contact us at service@dayee.com. We will respond to and complete your request. You also have the right to request that we transfer your personal information to another person or to export the data. If you wish to transfer the personal information above to a third party, be sure to specify the third party's information in detail. If you wish to exercise the above rights, contact us at our dedicated email address (service@dayee.com). We will respond to and complete your request within 15 business days. Note that information can only be transferred if technically feasible. Once the third party receives such personal information, we are no longer liable for the security of the information or the way it is processed. If the provision of specific personal information affects the rights of others, we may not be able to provide it to you (for example, if the provision of such personal information discloses the information of others, or trade secrets or intellectual property rights of any third party).
 
6.4. Right of refusal to collect and use personal information
If you have previously agreed to collection and usage of your personal information, you may, to the extent permitted by applicable law and regulations, withdraw any consent previously granted to us and have the right to refuse the use of such personal information. You may also contact us at our dedicated email address (service@dayee.com).We will respond to and complete your request, and we will no longer collect information related to such permissions after the revocation of your authorization.
 
6.5. Unregistration of an account
6.5.1. If your enterprise or organization user unregisters your enterprise organization's account, we will anonymize your personal information in that organization but keep your personal information as an individual user, unless you opt to unregister your personal account. After you have voluntarily unregistered your personal account, we will stop providing services to you and anonymize your personal information as required by applicable law.
6.5.2. If you wish to unregister your personal account, contact us at our dedicated email address (service@dayee.com). We will delete the account as soon as possible. Account cancellation may result in the removal of all your user data and account information, which shall be irretrievable. However, in specific circumstances (such as reasonably necessary to fulfill our legal obligations, resolve disputes, or prevent fraud and abuse), we may retain de-identified personal information after your account is canceled.

8. User Personal Information Security Protection Measures

Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private and our affiliates will adopt strict security systems and common industry security technologies and procedures to ensure that your personal information is not lost, disclosed, damaged or misused. Our suppliers, partners or third-party service providers who use the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private Platform will be subject to the confidentiality agreements, and will also be subject to data access control and operation monitoring.
When Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private believes that the user processing instructions of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private enterprise/organization user violate applicable laws or regulations, We will inform you.
We and our affiliated companies will adopt strict security systems, as well as industry-standard security technologies and procedures, to ensure that your personal information is not lost, leaked, damaged, or abused. Suppliers, partners, or third-party service providers of the recruitment platform will be bound by confidentiality agreements and will also be subject to data access controls and operational monitoring.
We and our affiliates will adopt strict security systems and common industry security technologies and procedures to ensure that your personal information is not lost, disclosed, damaged or misused. Our suppliers, partners or third-party service providers settled in the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Platform will be subject to the confidentiality agreements, and will also be subject to data access control and operation monitoring.
Our network service adopts encryption technologies such as Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) and provides browsing services through HTTPS and other ways to ensure the security of users' data during transmission. For example, when we display a user's mobile number and email address, the data has been masked. We use trusted protection mechanisms to protect data from malicious attacks. We also deploy access control mechanisms to prevent data misuse.
We attaches great importance to information security and privacy protection and strictly abides by the Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China, the Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China and other national laws and regulations. Intelligent Recruitment Management System regards network security, data security, and privacy protection as the bottom line of the company's operation. Intelligent Recruitment Management System continuously improves the management mechanism, strengthens the information security system, and improves the quality and effectiveness of work in the areas of employee publicity and education.
At present, Intelligent Recruitment Management System has qualified for security certifications such as Level III protection, ISO 27001 (information security management system certification), ISO/IEC27701(Privacy Information Management System Certification)、ISO9001(Quality Management System Certification) and ISO/IEC 27018 (public cloud personal information security management system).

In case of transmitting personal information abroad, we will expressly inform you of the purpose, recipient and security measures of personal information leaving the country, and obtain your consent separately.

9.1.1 Where clearly stipulated by laws and regulations;
9.1.2 Where your express authorization is obtained;
9.1.3 Where you actively submit personal information via the Internet, etc. Enterprises providing services through this Platform include some multinational corporations, which may use the Platform services outside China. Upon your active submission of a resume, the above-mentioned enterprises will obtain your resume. For specific practices, please refer to the privacy policies of each recruiting enterprise.
9.2. Storage period: We will take reasonable and feasible measures to store your personal information, and try our best to avoid collecting irrelevant personal information. We will only retain your personal information for the period required to achieve the purposes stated in this policy and the period required by applicable laws and regulations. Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private will, in accordance with the requirements of the Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China, keep relevant network logs for your use of the Intelligent Recruitment Management System Private services for at least six months.
9.3 During your use of the products and/or services, your personal information will be retained for a period of time for the purposes described in this Policy. After that, we will determine the retention period in accordance with the mandatory retention requirement specified by law. For example, the E-commerce Law of the People's Republic of China states that information about goods and services, as well as information on transactions, must be kept for at least three years after the transaction is completed. After the retention period, your personal information will be deleted or anonymized as required by applicable law.
9.4. After you or your organization have successfully unregistered an account, your personal information will be deleted or anonymized as required by applicable law.
9.5. If the service or operation are to be terminated, you will be notified at least 30 days in advance and your personal information will be deleted or anonymized after the termination.
9.6. Response to personal information security incidents: If our physical, technical or management protection facilities are damaged, resulting in unauthorized access, public disclosure, tampering or destruction of the information and damaging your legitimate rights and interests, we will promptly initiate an emergency plan to minimize the impact on you. 3.2.6我们从其他来源获取的信息

您理解并同意，如您作为企业组织管理员选择开通、管理招聘平台服务的，您所在企业组织用户的个人用户使用招聘平台服务相关功能/应用过程中可能会提交或产生相应的信息和数据（下称“企业控制数据”）。您确认并知晓，企业组织用户为上述企业控制数据的控制者，招聘平台仅根据企业组织用户管理员选择开通、管理和使用上述应用服务处理您的个人信息/数据。企业组织用户上传上述个人用户的个人信息之前，应确保已经事先获得上述个人用户的明确同意，并仅限收集实现企业运营及管理目的所必需的个人用户的个人信息，并已充分告知上述个人用户有关相关数据收集的目的、范围及使用方式等。

四、用户个人信息委托处理、共享、转让、公开披露的方式

4.1. 委托处理
为了提高效率、降低成本，我们可能会委托我们的子公司（苏州云才人力资源服务有限公司）、关联公司（用友网络科技股份有限公司）或其他外部专业服务商代表我们来处理您的个人信息。对我们委托处理个人信息的公司、组织和个人，我们会通过签署书面协议、审计等方式要求其遵守严格的保密义务并采取有效的保密措施，要求其只能在委托范围内处理您的信息，而不得出于其自身利益使用您的信息。
4.2. 共享
我们不会与其他组织和个人共享您的用户信息，但以下情况除外：

4.2.3. 与子公司或关联公司间共享：为便于我们基于招聘平台向您提供产品和服务，推荐您可能感兴趣的信息，识别账号异常，保护我们及我们的子公司（苏州云才人力资源服务有限公司）、关联公司（用友网络科技股份有限公司）或其他用户或公众的人身财产安全免遭侵害，经您的明确同意，您的用户个人信息可能会与我们的子公司或关联公司共享。
4.2.4. 与授权合作伙伴共享：如果您通过招聘平台使用的某些服务是由招聘平台的供应商、合作伙伴或第三方授权合作伙伴提供的，经您的明确同意，招聘平台将与其共享向您提供相应产品及服务所必需的个人信息；此外，为了与上述第三方授权合作伙伴共同开展市场推广活动，经您的明确同意，招聘平台可能与其共享开展活动所必需的以及在活动过程中产生的您的相关个人信息；
4.2.5.对我们与之共享用户信息的公司、组织和个人，我们会与其签署严格的保密协议以及信息保护约定，要求他们按照我们的说明、本隐私权政策以及其他任何相关的保密和安全措施来处理用户信息。

4.3. 转让 
我们不会将您的用户信息转让给任何公司、组织和个人，但以下情况除外：
4.3.1.在获取明确同意的情况下转让：获得您的明确同意后，我们会向其他方转让您的用户信息；

4.4. 公开披露 在对您的任何个人信息进行披露之前，我们会咨询您，并接受由您通过合同形式约定的个人信息披露内容。除了您的明确授权和法律法规要求，我们不会向其他人授权您的个人信息。
我们仅会在以下情况下，公开披露您的用户个人信息：
4.4.1.获得您明确同意或基于您的主动选择，我们可能会公开披露您的用户信息（包括但不限于核实雇佣状态等）；
4.4.2.或为保护我们及我们的及其关联公司用户或公众的人身财产安全免遭侵害，我们可能依据适用的法律或招聘平台相关协议、规则披露关于您的用户信息。
4.4.3.向在招聘过程中为公司提供服务或以其他方式为公司提供支持的服务提供商、业务合作伙伴或其他第三方（如招聘系统供应商）披露，无论在中国境内或境外；
4.4.4.根据法律法规、法律程序、诉讼或政府主管部门强制性要求的情况下；
4.4.5.就计划进行或已完成的公司资产和所有权转让向相关组织（包括其专业服务提供商和相关监管机构）披露；
4.4.6.为防止或缓解对您或其他人的人身或健康的重大和紧急的威胁，我们认为必须作出的披露。
4.5. 共享、转让、公开披露用户信息时事先征得授权同意的例外 以下情形中，共享、转让、公开披露您的用户信息无需事先征得您的授权同意：
4.5.1.与国家安全、国防安全有关的；
4.5.2. 与公共安全、公共卫生、重大公共利益有关的；
4.5.3. 与犯罪侦查、起诉、审判和判决执行等有关的；
4.5.4.出于维护您或其他个人的生命、财产等重大合法权益但又很难得到本人同意的；
4.5.5.您自行向社会公众公开的个人信息；
4.5.6.从合法公开披露的信息中收集个人信息的，如合法的新闻报道、政府信息公开等渠道。
4.5.7为本《隐私政策》所载之目的，您的个人数据可能会被传输给我们的关联公司、合作伙伴及第三方服务供应商、承包商及代理（以下统称“关联方”）。因此，我们的关联方可能会被授予访问您的个人数据的权利，用于数据存储以及招聘之目的。

对于收集的个人信息，您有权取得副本。您有权以结构化、通用且机器可读之格式获得此信息。您可以通过您所在的企业管理员获取您的个人信息副本，或者发送邮件到（service@dayee.com）与我们联系，我们会响应并完成您的上述请求。您也有权要求将该个人信息移转给其他人或行使导出数据的权利。若您希望将上述个人信息移转给第三方，请确保您会详述该第三方。如您要行使以上权利，请通过邮箱（service@dayee.com）与我们联系，我们会在15个工作日内响应并完成您的上述请求。请注意，仅在技术上可行的情况下才能转移信息。一旦该第三方接收该个人信息后，对该信息之安全与否或对其处理方式，概不负责。若提供特定个人信息会影响他人权利，则我们可能无法将之提供给您（例如，提供该个人信息会揭露他人信息、或任何第三方的商业秘密或知识产权信息）。

如您之前已同意收集并使用您的个人信息，在适用法律与规定的允许范围内，您可以撤回先前授予给我们的任何同意并有权拒绝我们使用该个人信息。您也可以通过邮箱（service@dayee.com）与我们联系，我们会响应并完成您的上述请求，撤回授权后我们将不再收集与该权限相关的信息。

七、Cookie和同类技术的使用方式

7.1. 我们会在招聘平台服务上使用并允许其他特定公司使用 Cookie、网络信标以及其他同类技术。此举是为了了解您对招聘平台服务的使用情况。
7.2.Cookie是在您访问网站时下载到您设备上的包含少量信息的文本文件。通过这些Cookie，我们能记住您在招聘平台上进行的选择。同时，我们使用自身的 Cookie 和/或第三方Cookie及其他标识符（如网络信标）查看您如何使用我们的网站和服务，以便增强其性能，并根据您的偏好选择对其进行开发。
7.3.您可根据自己的偏好管理Cookie，您也可以清除设备上保存的所有 Cookie。大部分网络浏览器都设有阻止Cookie的功能。但如果您这么做，则需要在每一次访问招聘平台时更改用户设置。如需详细了解如何更改浏览器设置，请访问您使用的浏览器的相关设置页面。

八、用户个人信息的安全保护措施

我们及我们的关联公司将采用严格的安全制度以及行业通行的安全技术和程序来确保您的个人信息不被丢失、泄露、毁损或滥用。我们的供应商、合作伙伴或第三方服务商将受到保密协议的约束，同时还将受到数据信息的权限控制和操作监控。
当我们认为使用招聘平台企业/组织用户的用户处理指令违反适用的法律或法规，我们会向您进行告知。
招聘平台及招聘平台的关联公司将采用严格的安全制度以及行业通行的安全技术和程序来确保您的个人信息不被丢失、泄露、毁损或滥用。招聘平台的供应商、合作伙伴或第三方服务商将受到保密协议的约束，同时还将受到数据信息的权限控制和操作监控。
我们的网络服务采取了传输层安全协议等加密技术，通过https等方式提供浏览服务，确保用户数据在传输过程中的安全，比如用户显示手机号、邮箱，均做了数据脱敏处理。我们会使用受信赖的保护机制防止数据遭到恶意攻击；我们会部署访问控制机制，避免数据被违规使用。
我们高度重视信息安全与隐私保护，严格遵守《中华人民共和国数据安全法》《中华人民共和国个人信息保护法》等国家法律法规，将网络安全、数据安全、隐私保护作为公司运营底线，持续完善管理机制、 强化信息安全体系及员工宣传教育等领域的工作质效。
招聘平台公司目前已通过等级保护三级、ISO27001（信息安全管理体系认证）、ISO/IEC27701（隐私信息管理体系认证证书）、ISO9001（质量管理体系）和 ISO/IEC 27018（公有云个人信息安全管理体系）等安全认证。
 
九、我们如何存储您的个人信息

9.1.存储地点：我们将在中华人民共和国境内运营的为您提供服务中收集和产生的个人信息存储在中华人民共和国境内。如涉及向境外传输个人信息，我们将明确向您告知个人信息出境的目的、接收方、安全保障措施等情况，并另行征得您的同意。但以下情形除外：
9.1.1.法律法规有明确规定；
9.1.2.获得您的明确授权；
9.1.3.您通过互联网进行个人主动投递等行为。通过本平台开展服务的企业包含部分跨国企业公司，上述公司可能在境外使用本平台服务，您主动投递简历后上述公司将获取您的简历，具体实践请见各招聘企业的隐私政策。
9.2.存储期限：我们会采取合理可行的措施存储您的个人信息，尽力避免收集无关的个人信息。我们只会在在限于达成本政策所述目的所需的期限以及所适用法律法规所要求的期限内保留您的个人信息。招聘平台将依据《中华人民共和国网络安全法》的要求，就您使用招聘平台应用服务留存相关的网络日志不少于六个月。
9.3. 在您使用我们的产品与/或服务期间，您的个人信息将在为了实现本政策所述目的之期限内保存，同时将结合法律有强制的留存要求期限的规定确定，如《中华人民共和国电子商务法》要求商品和服务信息、交易信息保存时间自交易完成之日起不少于三年。在超出保存期间后，我们会根据适用法律的要求删除您的个人信息或进行匿名化处理。
9.4. 另外在您或由您组织发起的成功注销账号后，我们会根据适用法律的要求删除您的个人信息或进行匿名化处理。
9.5 如果我们终止服务或运营，我们会至少提前三十日向您通知，并在终止服务或运营后对您的个人信息进行删除或匿名化处理。
9.6 个人信息安全事件的响应：如果我们的物理、技术或管理防护设施遭到破坏，导致信息被非授权访问、公开披露、篡改或毁坏，导致您的合法权益受损的，我们会及时启动应急预案，以尽可能降低对您个人的影响。如发生个人信息安全事件，我们还将按照法律法规的要求向您告知安全事件的基本情况和可能的影响、我们已采取或将要采取的处置措施、您可自主防范和降低风险的建议、对您的补救措施。我们将以短信、电话、推送通知及其他合理渠道告知您，难以逐一告知的，我们会采取合理、有效的方式发布公告。同时，我们还将按照监管部门要求，上报个人信息安全事件的处置情况。
 
十、未成年人用户信息的特别约定

我们非常重视对未成年人信息的保护。招聘平台产品及服务不提供给任何16周岁以下的未成年人，如您未满16周岁，请勿使用我们的产品及服务。如果我们发现在未事先获得可证实的父母或法定监护人明确同意的情况下收集了未成年人的个人信息，将会采取措施尽快删除相关数据。若您未成年人的父母或监护人，发现在未事先获得可证实的父母或监护人明确同意的情况下收集了未成年人的个人信息，请与我们取得联系，我们将进行删除。
 
十一、隐私权政策的更新

11.1. 我们保留不时更新或修改本政策的权利，并会在对本《隐私政策》做出重大变更时通过不同渠道向您发送变更通知，例如：我们会在你登录及版本更新时以网站公示、推送通知、弹窗的形式向你展示变更后的隐私权政策。届时会再次征得您同意最新版的隐私协议，以继续使用招聘平台服务。一旦您继续使用招聘平台服务，将被视为对更新后的隐私权政策的接受和认可。
11.2. 如果您想了解用友云隐私政策历史版本，请点击此处。
 
十二、投诉与举报

如您有关于个人信息安全的投诉和举报，请与我们联系。

邮箱:【service@dayee.com】 一般情况下，我们将在收到您的问题、意见或建议之日起十五天内予以回复。
 
十三、我们的联系方式

3.1.3.
